Chang, Y.-T., Chiu, I., Wang, Q., Bustamante, J., Jiang, W., Rycaj, K., Yi, S., Li, J., Kowalski-Muegge, J., and Matsui, W. (2023), “Loss of p 53 enhances the tumor-initiating potential and drug resistance of clonogenic multiple myeloma cells,” Blood Advances, 7, 3551–3560. https://doi.org/10.1182/bloodadvances.2022009387.
